# VantaX

> VantaX is India's first structured hiring audition platform, built by VantaHire (Airevolabs LLP, Bangalore). Real companies post real engineering problems. Candidates solve them individually in timed, AI-augmented sessions. Top performers are introduced to hiring companies.

## About VantaX

VantaX replaces the broken resume-to-interview pipeline for early-career hiring in India. Instead of filtering candidates by resume, college brand, or DSA scores, VantaX evaluates them on their ability to solve real company problems under time constraint.

- Format: 3 challenges, 2 hours each, individual, fully online
- AI tools: Encouraged (tests judgment, not memorization)
- Scoring: AI pre-score + human jury moderation on standardized rubric
- Outcome: Top performers get introduced to partner companies for interviews
- Price: INR 199 + GST
- Event: VantaX 2026, April 25-29, 2026

## Pages

- [Home](https://vantax.vantahire.com/): Landing page for candidates
- [What Is VantaX](https://vantax.vantahire.com/what-is-vantax): Detailed explainer
- [For Companies](https://vantax.vantahire.com/companies): Company partner page
- [Start Audition](https://vantax.vantahire.com/companies/start): Company onboarding form
- [Jury](https://vantax.vantahire.com/jury): Jury member signup
- [Privacy Policy](https://vantax.vantahire.com/privacy): Data handling practices
- [Terms of Service](https://vantax.vantahire.com/terms): Participation terms
- [Refund Policy](https://vantax.vantahire.com/refund): Cancellation and refund terms
